title: Drac's Builder Wands
description: Drac's Builder Wands is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 26.1.2 that adds multiple tiers of survival-friendly building wands with placement previews, shared placement modes, and scalable building power progression
body:
Drac's Builder Wands is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 26.1.2 that adds multiple tiers of survival-friendly building wands with placement previews, shared placement modes, scalable building power progression, and dangerous Starforged ruins hidden throughout the world.

Includes:
• Column, Row, Wall, and Plane placement modes

• Live block placement previews

• Wood through Netherite wand progression

• The Starforged Netherite Wand obtainable through a custom pedestal ritual

• Starforged Ruins that generate rarely within Dark Oak Forests

• Tiered randomized loot tables tied to structure generation

• Custom Starforged Wisps with withering wind charge attacks

• Survival progression and exploration-focused gameplay

• Creative mode tab for easy access
